channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Passengers begin evacuating from cruise ship hit by hantavirus
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- German passengers evacuated from Hantavirus-hit cruise ship
- Passengers evacuated from hantavirus-stricken cruise ship begin flying home from Canary Islands
- Hantavirus ship evacuation nears completion as 94 flown home
- Hantavirus: Passengers leave Tenerife on evacuation flights
- Spain expects over 90 evacuees from hantavirus-hit cruise ship on Sunday: health official
- French national shows symptoms on return from hantavirus-hit ship

- Hantavirus ship evacuees begin returning home
- Passengers evacuated from hantavirus-hit cruise ship begin flying home from Spain's Canary Islands

item.title: Iran sends response to US proposal to end war via mediator Pakistan

- Lifting of sanctions, 30-day negotiation period: Inside Iran's response to US proposal that Trump called ‘unacceptable’
- Iran sets war-ending terms as US truce hangs in the balance: Proposal via Pakistan, explained
- Flash: Iran's response to U.S. proposal focuses on ending war, safety of maritime traffic in the Gulf and Strait of Hormuz -- media report
